zh.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Nicholson於1430年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Nicholson30歲，母親Margaret Trollope30歲。他於1459年與Anne Guest在英國英格蘭越可爾斯卡波洛聖 瑪麗 煙雨 霍利 阿波斯特萊斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

zh-hans.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Nicholson于1430年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William Nicholson30岁，母亲Margaret Trollope30岁。他于1459年与Anne Guest在英国英格兰越可爾斯卡波洛聖 瑪麗 煙雨 霍利 阿波斯特萊斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)olas or the vernacular form Nic(h)ol + son; see Nichol , Nicholas . In Scotland the name was sometimes substituted for McNichol .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Nicolaisen or Nikolaisen , or of the Swedish cognate Niklasson, patronymics from equivalents of the personal name Nicholas .

variants.name: Nicolson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain, Murdo.
English and Northern Scottish: variant of   Nicholson  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Nicholson was born in 1430, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Nicholson, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Trollope, was 30. He married Anne Guest in 1459, in Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1510, in his hometown, and was buried in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Anne Guest en 1459, à Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1510, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: William Nicholsonが1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Nicholsonは30歳，母Margaret Trollopeは30歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスカーボロウサイント マリー ウィス ホーリー アポストレスでAnne Guestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: William Nicholson(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Nicholson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Trollope(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스카버루 세인트 메리 위스 홀이 아포스틀레스에서 Anne Guest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에 묻혔다.

ru.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Nicholson родился в 1430 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Nicholson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Trollope, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Guest в 1459 г. в местности сеинт мэри вит холи апостлесь, скарбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1510 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
